2026 HUNGARIAN GRAND PRIX 
24 – 26 July 2026 
 
  
  
From The Stewards      Document 17 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  24 July 2026 
 
        T i m e   14:45 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Free Practice 1 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 1,2,3,7,9 and 11.
